creator: ivan.uadm@gmail.com
text:
Hi There

looks like a bug, no directory  http://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/snapshots/ISO-IMAGES/11.0/ meanwhile http://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/snapshots/ISO-IMAGES/12.0/ exists. 
not all mirrors have this, for example http://ftp.se.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/snapshots/ISO-IMAGES/11.0/ - looks fine.
